{{Quote|I processed it several times, but kept coming up with an irrational remainder, so I queried him. That's when he fired.|Jujiran Halbeet on Gavrilonnis Tejere's shooting of him|<ref name="HoloNetNews">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|53|news/13425_1.html|Would-Be Saboteur Captured}}</ref>}}
'''Jujiran Halbeet''' was a [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] maintenance worker at the [[Yag'Dhul Ambassadorial Landing Platform]].

==Biography==
The [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] Jujiran Halbeet was a maintenance worker who worked alongside his<ref name="CSWE" /> fellow Givin<ref name="HoloNetNews" /> [[Gavrilonnis Tejere]].<ref name="CSWE" /> While working at the [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]] Ambassadorial Landing Platform some time just prior to the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Halbeet spotted his co-worker as he attempted to commit an act of sabotage. Upon confronting Tejere, his co-worker shot Halbeet with a concealed [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], with the force of the impact knocking him off the platform. Fortunately for Halbeet, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] were passing in an [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxi]] under the platform and caught him. The two masters then apprehended Tejere for his attempted crimes.

{{Char-stub}}
